text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is finally the day of Haru Urara's debut
race!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Urara's debut! ♪ Urara's debut! ♪ It's my debut!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Of course! I'm actually debuting! Me! It's so cool!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Having a debut means I get to run a lot!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: And I love to run! So I'm super-duper happy!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
And guess what! I feel like I've gotten stronger
than I was before!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I always win in our little contests after all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If the results of our contests boosted her
confidence, then I guess all those days of
soreness were worth it.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: That's why today, I'm gonna get first, for sure!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'm definitely gonna be number one! Here I
go!
